'''J9-R1''' was a [[J9 worker drone/Legends|J9 worker drone]] assigned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. Assigned to the [[Hydroponics/Legends|hydroponics]] bay, the unit - along with its two companions ([[J9-B4]] and [[J9-K6-24]]) - was considered a "busybody." A self styled "efficiency expert" with endless suggestions to improve crew moral and efficiency, it constantly bickered with the other two J9 units.
